**What & why**
What this changes and the problem it solves. Link the issue it was
discussed in, if any.

**Checklist**
- [ ] `npm run build && npm test` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behavior change
- [ ] README updated if this touches a public API or config
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) — DCO

**Notes for reviewers**
Anything non-obvious: trade-offs made, alternatives rejected, follow-up
work left out of scope.
